description: List properties and responses of structural element links in the range.

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: displacement in deformable models of this link. Displacement of target object minum displacement of source node (node-local coordinate system).

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: Force in deformable models of this link (sign corresponds with sign of displacement)

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: value of property s in deformable models of this link (see Link Model Properties )

keywords.name: source-node
keywords.description: node from which the link emanates

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: yield state for each degree-of-freedom that has a deformable model

keywords.name: target
keywords.description: type (node-to-node or node-to-object) and ID (or component-id of a node) of the link target
